1.author: Erzhan Suleimenov
1.text: Metan KZ helped our logistics company switch to CNG without interrupting operations. Fuel costs dropped by 35%, and our fleet now runs cleaner and quieter. A truly professional partner in sustainable energy.

2.author: Ainur Kadyrova
2.text: We converted over 200 taxis with Metan KZ, and the results are fantastic. Drivers appreciate the safety and efficiency, while our customers value our eco-friendly approach. The best CNG network in Kazakhstan!

3.author: Sergey Petrov
3.text: The Metan KZ stations are modern, well-maintained, and easy to access. Our team regularly uses their maintenance services — everything is fast, safe, and meets international standards.

4.author: Dana Urazbayeva
4.text: We partnered with Metan KZ for a large-scale fleet conversion project. Their engineers are highly skilled, and the process was smooth from start to finish. Excellent service and great technical support.

About.bannerDescription: Metan KZ has been providing clean and affordable fuel solutions across Kazakhstan since 2025. We are committed to offering reliable service, modern refueling stations, and comfort for every driver on the road.

Founder.quote:
Every day at Metan KZ, we make refueling in Kazakhstan cleaner, faster, and more reliable. Our mission is to provide energy that moves people forward — with care for comfort, safety, and the environment. We strive to make every trip begin with trust and end with confidence.

Metan KZ is more than just fuel. It’s attention to detail, modern service, and an honest attitude toward every customer. We are developing infrastructure and technology to ensure a sustainable future where energy serves both people and nature.

2014.title: 2014 Start
2014.text: In 2014, Metan KZ was founded, starting work in the field of natural gas and compressed methane (CNG) technologies. This year marked the beginning of eco-friendly fuel development in Central Asia.

2015.title: 2015–2018 Growth
2015.text: The company focused on market analysis, design, and construction of the first CNG stations. The professional team was formed and the technological base established.

2019.title: 2019–2021 Opportunities
2019.text: Metan KZ actively expanded operations, introducing new quality and safety standards. The company became a trusted partner for transport and logistics businesses.

2022.title: 2022 Development
2022.text: Metan KZ launched new CNG stations and introduced automation and digital solutions to improve service and efficiency.

2023.title: 2023 Expansion
2023.text: Preparation began for the launch of Metan KZ, focusing on developing CNG infrastructure in Kazakhstan and selecting key station locations.

2024.title: 2024 Progress
2024.text: Throughout 2024, Metan KZ conducted construction and testing of equipment, introducing energy-efficient and safe technologies.

2025.title: 2025 Present
2025.text: In 2025, Metan KZ officially began operating across Kazakhstan — a milestone toward a clean and sustainable energy future.

2025_expand.title: 2025 Future
2025_expand.text: After launch, Metan KZ expanded its network nationwide, integrating smart monitoring systems and energy-efficient equipment.

future.title: 2025+ Forward
future.text: Metan KZ aims to lead Central Asia’s clean-fuel industry, building sustainable, safe, and accessible energy for all.

Services.bannerDescription: If you are looking for a full-service CNG and gas infrastructure company, look to Metan KZ. We are doing our best to be a partner for all of your sustainable energy and fueling needs.

stations.title: Methane Stations
stations.description: Metan KZ is a modern network of methane fueling stations providing drivers with eco-friendly and cost-effective fuel. We operate under international safety and quality standards.

equipment.title: Gas Equipment
equipment.description: We offer a wide range of equipment: gas storage tanks, compressor units, refueling modules, and reducers. All equipment is certified and meets industrial standards.

installation.title: Installation & Service
installation.description: Metan KZ specialists perform installation, commissioning, and maintenance of gas equipment, ensuring reliable and safe operation.

delivery.title: Methane Delivery
delivery.description: Metan KZ supplies compressed (CNG) and liquefied methane (LNG) throughout Kazakhstan and Central Asia, providing full logistics and fueling services.

stations.1_title: Design and engineering of CNG stations
stations.1_desc: We develop engineering solutions for CNG stations, ensuring accuracy, safety, and compliance with standards.
stations.2_desc: We provide certified compressors, storage modules, and gas systems with guaranteed quality.
stations.3_desc: We perform installation, configuration, and commissioning to ensure stable and continuous operation.

equipment.1_desc: High-performance compressors with low energy consumption ensure stable gas supply.
equipment.2_desc: Reliable systems resistant to high pressure ensure safe and long-term operation.
equipment.3_desc: Modern dispensers and regulators provide accurate gas delivery and full parameter control.

installation.1_desc: We professionally install equipment following all engineering and safety requirements.
installation.2_desc: We install high-pressure pipelines and storage modules with reliability and durability.
installation.3_desc: We test equipment, adjust parameters, and verify stable system performance.

delivery.1_desc: We organize deliveries across Central Asia, ensuring safety and timely arrival.
delivery.2_desc: We assist with documentation, certification, and customs procedures for smooth logistics.
delivery.3_desc: We provide secure storage, quality packaging, and full control during transportation.

step1.title: Project analysis and calculation
step1.content: We inspect the site and determine the optimal technical solution.

step2.title: Contract and documentation
step2.content: We prepare the estimate, agree on conditions, and sign the contract.

step3.title: Equipment delivery and preparation
step3.content: We deliver the equipment and prepare the site for installation.

step4.title: Installation and commissioning
step4.content: We install the system and put the facility into operation.

OurBenefits.title: Our benefits
OurBenefits.description: Stable methane supply with fair pricing, modern infrastructure, and 24/7 support.
OurBenefits.stable_supply_desc: We provide a stable supply of certified methane according to KZ and UZ standards, ensuring quality and transparency at every stage.
OurBenefits.best_price_desc: The optimal methane price is ensured through our own infrastructure and well-organized, expanded regional logistics between Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan.
OurBenefits.support_desc: Our office in Samarkand operates without days off. We offer support, consultations, and prompt solutions to any issues at any time.

Pricing.title: Pricing
Pricing.description: We offer three levels of CNG station configuration.

Work.bannerDescription: Our portfolio represents 12 years of expertise in methane (CNG) technologies — from methane fueling stations to specialized equipment and tools.

storage-tank.title: Gas Storage Tank
storage-tank.projectEquipment: A modern gas storage tank with a volume of 950–1500 L was created, featuring pressure control and high operational safety. The focus is on long-term storage, minimal leakage, and easy maintenance.

compressor-unit.title: Compressor Unit
compressor-unit.projectEquipment: A compressor block was installed for compressing natural gas to 200–250 bar. The system ensures stable operation, minimal energy loss, and full compliance with safety standards.

gas-separator.title: Gas Separator
gas-separator.description: Gas purification from impurities and moisture
gas-separator.projectEquipment: The separator-dryer is designed to remove moisture and mechanical impurities from compressed gas. It protects equipment and improves gas quality for safe transportation.

gas-filter.title: Dryer / Filter
gas-filter.description: Moisture and condensate removal from gas
gas-filter.projectEquipment: The filtration-drying module removes condensate and moisture from gas down to -50°C. It optimizes gas quality and extends equipment service life.

gas-dispenser.title: Gas Dispenser
gas-dispenser.projectEquipment: The methane dispenser provides safe and fast vehicle refueling. Supports 200–250 bar pressure and features dual hoses for efficient station operation.

pressure-regulator.title: Pressure Regulator
pressure-regulator.projectEquipment: The pressure regulator stabilizes inlet and outlet pressure, maintaining an optimal range of 5–25 bar. Ensures reliable operation of industrial gas lines.

accumulator-block.title: Accumulator Block
accumulator-block.projectEquipment: The accumulator block provides buffer gas storage in 12–18 high-pressure cylinders. Ensures safe operation and quick integration with stationary and mobile stations.

safety-valve.title: Safety Valve
safety-valve.projectEquipment: The safety valve protects the station from overpressure. Automatically releases pressure at critical levels, reducing risks for equipment and personnel.

gas-distribution-block.title: Gas Distribution Ramp
gas-distribution-block.projectEquipment: The gas distribution ramp ensures accurate and safe distribution of gas across station lines, optimizing flow and pressure.

compressor-module.title: Compressor Module
compressor-module.description: Module with compressor and gas filtration
compressor-module.projectEquipment: The compressor module provides gas compression and filtration up to 2500 m³/h. Ensures stable pressure and high gas purity for distribution.

gas-cylinder.title: Gas Cylinder
gas-cylinder.description: Cylinder for gas storage and transportation
gas-cylinder.projectEquipment: The gas cylinder ensures safe compressed gas storage and transportation. Withstands up to 250 bar and suits mobile and stationary stations.

control-cabinet.title: Control Cabinet
control-cabinet.description: Electrical control of station and equipment
control-cabinet.projectEquipment: The control cabinet provides centralized control of compressors, sensors, and valves. Supports monitoring and automation, and integrates with SCADA systems.

items.decision1: Integrated methane refueling systems designed for stable operation, safety control, and efficient gas distribution at all stages.
items.decision2: Automated reservoir management solutions providing pressure monitoring, volume control, and real-time operational reliability.
items.decision3: High-performance filtration units ensuring gas purity, equipment protection, and long-term stability of refueling infrastructure.
items.decision4: Modern gas dispensing columns engineered for accurate fuel delivery, durability, and continuous operation under load.
items.decision5: Advanced control systems enabling centralized monitoring, diagnostics, and optimization of methane refueling processes.
items.decision6: Certified refueling tools and components meeting industry standards, safe and efficient in operation.

News.bannerDescription: Stay tuned with our news, expert tips and articles.

1.title: Advances in Methane Capture Technologies
1.description: Methane capture technologies are evolving rapidly, allowing energy companies to reduce greenhouse gas emissions while increasing operational efficiency in natural gas extraction. New methods include advanced chemical absorption, cryogenic separation, and membrane technologies that significantly improve methane recovery rates. These innovations also provide economic benefits by converting methane into a usable energy source, reducing flaring, and contributing to sustainable industrial practices. Ongoing research focuses on scaling these technologies for both onshore and offshore operations, ensuring compliance with stricter environmental regulations and carbon reduction targets.

2.title: Global Gas Market Trends in 2022
2.description: The gas industry sees rising demand across Asia and Europe. Companies are investing in LNG infrastructure and innovative storage solutions to meet the growing global energy needs. Market dynamics are shifting due to geopolitical tensions, technological advancements in extraction and distribution, and the global push for cleaner energy sources. Analysts predict that natural gas will remain a key transition fuel for decades, balancing energy security with environmental commitments. Additionally, the integration of smart monitoring systems and AI-driven demand forecasting is reshaping operational strategies for gas companies worldwide.

3.title: Petroleum Innovations Driving Efficiency
3.description: Petroleum refining and distribution technologies are becoming smarter. New digital monitoring and AI-driven optimizations help reduce operational costs and environmental impact. Advanced catalysts, automated process control, and predictive maintenance systems enable refineries to maximize output while minimizing energy consumption and waste. Additionally, innovations in logistics, including AI-based routing and storage optimization, streamline the supply chain and improve market responsiveness. These combined efforts contribute to a more sustainable petroleum industry that can meet increasing global demand while reducing its carbon footprint.

4.title: Fuel Efficiency Standards for Transport
4.description: New regulations in Central Asia enforce higher fuel efficiency standards for vehicles, aiming to reduce emissions and promote cleaner energy solutions. Manufacturers are adapting by producing hybrid and electric vehicles, optimizing engine performance, and introducing lightweight materials. The policy also encourages fleet operators to adopt energy management practices, regular vehicle maintenance, and driver training programs to further reduce fuel consumption. Over the coming years, these measures are expected to significantly lower urban air pollution and contribute to global climate goals, while simultaneously boosting economic efficiency for transport companies.

5.title: Methane Leak Detection with AI
5.description: AI-powered sensors are now deployed to detect methane leaks in pipelines and storage facilities, helping companies prevent environmental damage and optimize safety. The system uses machine learning algorithms to analyze sensor data in real-time, identify anomalies, and predict potential leak points before they escalate. Integration with automated alert systems allows rapid response and minimizes downtime. This technology not only enhances environmental protection but also improves regulatory compliance and reduces financial losses associated with leaks. Future developments aim to expand coverage, integrate with drones, and provide predictive maintenance insights for critical infrastructure.

6.title: Oil Export Infrastructure Expansion
6.description: Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan expand their oil transport networks, improving export capacity and connecting new markets in Asia and Europe. Projects include modernizing pipelines, constructing new storage terminals, and upgrading port facilities for faster and safer loading. Enhanced infrastructure allows for more reliable supply chains, reduced transportation costs, and increased competitiveness on global markets. Environmental and safety measures are integrated into every stage of construction, ensuring that expansion projects comply with international standards and reduce the risk of spills or accidents.

7.title: Gas Storage Innovations for Winter
7.description: Energy companies invest in advanced gas storage to handle winter peaks, ensuring stable supply while minimizing losses and environmental impact. Technologies include underground storage, liquefied natural gas tanks, and smart grid integration for dynamic distribution. Advanced monitoring systems track pressure, temperature, and consumption patterns to optimize storage efficiency. These measures provide energy security for consumers, reduce the risk of shortages, and enable more flexible pricing models. Collaboration with meteorological agencies allows companies to forecast demand spikes and prepare accordingly, enhancing resilience against extreme weather events.

8.title: Fuel Market Forecast 2023
8.description: The regional fuel market is expected to grow steadily in 2026, driven by increased industrial demand and investment in refining technologies. Analysts highlight opportunities in alternative fuels, renewable blending, and efficiency improvements across the supply chain. Companies are also exploring strategic partnerships to optimize production, reduce environmental impact, and capture emerging markets. Price trends will be influenced by geopolitical developments, technological adoption, and global economic conditions. Businesses that leverage predictive analytics and market intelligence are better positioned to adapt to fluctuations and secure competitive advantages.

9.title: Methane Pipeline Safety Improvements
9.description: Recent upgrades in pipeline monitoring and automatic shutdown systems significantly reduce the risk of methane leaks and accidents. Innovations include real-time pressure sensing, AI-based anomaly detection, and integrated emergency response protocols. These improvements not only protect the environment but also enhance operational efficiency by reducing unplanned downtime and maintenance costs. Training programs for personnel ensure that safety measures are properly implemented, while community engagement initiatives inform local populations about safety standards and emergency procedures. Long-term benefits include enhanced trust with regulators and investors and compliance with stricter environmental legislation.

10.title: Petrol Distribution Network Expansion
10.description: New petrol stations and distribution points are being deployed across Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan to meet rising demand in urban and rural areas. The expansion involves optimizing supply chains, implementing digital inventory management systems, and adopting environmentally friendly construction methods. Enhanced infrastructure ensures reliable fuel delivery, reduces wait times, and supports growing transportation networks. Additionally, companies are investing in alternative fuels and hybrid station models that integrate electric charging points, contributing to a more sustainable energy ecosystem.

11.title: Oil Refinery Efficiency Upgrades
11.description: Refineries in Central Asia adopt new catalysts and automation to boost oil refining efficiency and reduce environmental footprint. Enhanced process control, energy recovery systems, and emission monitoring contribute to cost reduction and regulatory compliance. The integration of AI and predictive maintenance allows for more precise operations, minimizing waste and optimizing resource allocation. These upgrades position refineries for long-term competitiveness while aligning with global sustainability initiatives.

12.title: Gas Industry Investment Opportunities
12.description: Investors are eyeing new projects in gas extraction, storage, and transportation, particularly focusing on sustainable and efficient technologies. The sector offers long-term returns driven by rising demand for cleaner energy sources. Investment strategies include joint ventures, infrastructure modernization, and deployment of smart monitoring systems to reduce operational risk. Global market trends and regulatory frameworks influence project viability, making data-driven decision-making essential for success. Innovative financing models and partnerships with technology providers are enabling faster adoption of next-generation solutions.

13.title: Methane Utilization for Electricity
13.description: New projects convert captured methane into electricity, providing an eco-friendly energy source while reducing greenhouse gas emissions. Combined heat and power plants, gas turbines, and biogas integration allow efficient conversion of methane into usable energy. This approach not only mitigates environmental impact but also contributes to energy security and local economic development. Researchers are exploring advanced storage methods and hybrid systems that integrate renewable energy sources for continuous, stable power supply. The projects showcase how methane can become a sustainable contributor to the regional energy mix.

14.title: Fuel Storage Safety Regulations
14.description: Regulatory authorities enforce stricter safety measures for fuel storage facilities to prevent accidents and improve worker safety. Updated guidelines include automated monitoring, fire suppression systems, and regular safety audits. Companies must ensure compliance with environmental and safety standards, implement emergency response plans, and provide staff training. The regulations aim to minimize risk, protect communities, and maintain operational continuity. Adoption of new technologies and proactive risk management strategies helps fuel storage facilities operate safely and efficiently in the long term.

15.title: Petrol Technology for Modern Vehicles
15.description: Innovations in petrol engines improve fuel consumption and reduce harmful emissions in modern cars and commercial vehicles. Technologies include variable valve timing, direct injection systems, turbocharging, and hybrid integration. Enhanced engine diagnostics, AI-powered tuning, and predictive maintenance tools optimize performance while lowering costs. These developments not only meet stricter emission regulations but also provide consumers with more reliable, efficient, and environmentally friendly vehicles. Collaboration with research institutions accelerates innovation and supports the adoption of clean transport solutions on a larger scale.

16.title: Advanced Methane Storage Solutions
16.description: New methane storage technologies are being deployed to improve safety, efficiency, and environmental sustainability. Innovations include high-pressure tanks with advanced insulation, underground storage caverns, and AI-driven monitoring systems. These solutions minimize leak risks, optimize storage capacity, and allow flexible supply for industrial and energy applications. Research is ongoing into hybrid storage methods that combine renewable energy integration and methane capture, further reducing carbon footprints. Companies adopting these solutions benefit from enhanced regulatory compliance, cost reduction, and improved public trust.

17.title: Oil Pipeline Maintenance Innovations
17.description: Pipeline operators are implementing AI-powered inspection drones, smart sensors, and predictive maintenance algorithms to prevent leaks and reduce downtime. Advanced coating materials and corrosion monitoring extend pipeline lifespan, while real-time data analytics allow quick response to anomalies. By combining traditional engineering expertise with digital solutions, companies improve operational efficiency, safety, and environmental compliance. This proactive approach reduces emergency repair costs and strengthens supply reliability for both domestic and international markets.

18.title: Fuel Innovations for Industrial Efficiency
18.description: Industrial plants are adopting next-generation fuels and hybrid energy systems to reduce emissions and increase efficiency. Technologies include biofuel blending, hydrogen-enriched fuels, and AI-controlled combustion optimization. Combined with energy recovery and heat reuse systems, these innovations significantly cut operational costs while meeting stricter environmental regulations. Companies also leverage digital twins to simulate fuel performance and forecast consumption, ensuring better planning and minimal waste. These efforts contribute to sustainable industry growth and align with global energy transition goals.
